shared_identity_rationale: all retained modes use the same downstream B-coherence-gain unit, identity orientation, one-opportunity aggregation, two-order pairing family, missingness policy, and normalized paired-margin calculation; the null exercises only that analysis surface and no upstream carrier

matched_null_generator.pair_rule: for each seed and order stratum, null_candidate and null_comparator receive the same exact rational response
matched_null_generator.selection_provenance: fixed rank-derived rational sequence with prime denominator 23; selected without loading any I03 source or candidate/runtime value
matched_null_generator.scientific_interpretation: none; the panels exercise numerical symmetry and analysis resolution only

estimator: maximum of measurement_resolution and the maximum absolute matched-null normalized margin across all seeds and both order strata
forbidden_inputs: PyGRC imports, models, snapshots, runtime records, or graph values
I03 conformance fixture values, observations, branches, topologies, comparators, outcomes, or digests
P2-I1 calibration panels, delta, metric results, or evidence

quarantine_proof.only_equal_numeric_value_allowed: measurement_resolution 1e-12 from the independently frozen pre-I03 L02 metric sheet

execution_policy.failure_rule: a config, identity, schema, candidate-exclusion, quarantine, output, or reconstruction failure leaves I05 invalid or incomplete; no parameter adaptation is permitted

authorization_requirement.identity_rule: the later I05 freeze must bind the exact I04 preregistration, analysis policy, and calibration policy SHA-256 identities supplied to the entry point

expected_I05_artifacts: owner-authorized I05 calibration-execution freeze binding exact I04 identities
matched-null calibration record with every raw pair and per-order per-seed margin
frozen lane-local metric sheet with populated delta status, value, rationale, and calibration reference only
reconstruction receipt proving byte-identical governed output
